b:T109c4,<div class="specification">
<p>The figures below show a human and a sheep brain.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: Pearson Scott Foresman, donated to the Wikimedia Foundation,<br/>https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Convolution_he_-_sheep_and_human_brain.png]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The human brain is larger than the brain of many animals. Identify <strong>one</strong> other difference between the human brain and the brain of a sheep.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline the main feature of neural pruning.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the name of the part of the brain that controls breathing rate.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain the need for the adult human brain to be supplied continuously with a relatively large supply of blood.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>c:T74e,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. larger cerebral <span style="text-decoration: underline;">cortex</span> in human brain ✔ <em>Do not accept larger <span style="text-decoration: underline;">brain</span> for human as it is in the stem</em>.</p>
<p>b. higher folding in human brain<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>increased surface area in human brain ✔</p>
<p>c. angle of spinal cord more vertical in human<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>angle of spinal cord more horizontal in sheep ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. loss of unused neurons ✔ <em>Accept apoptosis or programmed neuron death</em>.</p>
<p>b. loss of unused synapses<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>reducing the number of synapses<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>leaving more efficient synaptic configurations ✔ <em>Do not accept "connection" instead of "synapse"</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>medulla «oblongata» ✔ <em>Do not accept "brain stem"</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the brain contains a very large number of neurons and therefore consumes large amount of energy ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<p>b. «large» requirement for oxygen/glucose to provide energy for «aerobic» cell respiration ✔</p>
<p>c. energy used to sustain the electric charges of neurons<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>energy used to sustain the membrane potential of neurons<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>energy used to produce neurotransmitters ✔</p>
<p>d. brain has continuous activity that requires continuous supply of oxygen/glucose ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.HL.TZ0.4"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-2-the-human-brain, a-1-neural-development"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
